nodes.name: Spot-flanked barbet
nodes.summary: Spot-flanked barbet（Tricholaema lacrymosa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Spot-flanked barbet。

nodes.name: Tricholaema
nodes.summary: Tricholaema（Tricholaema）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Hairy-breasted barbet、Red-fronted barbet、Miombo pied barbet等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Spot-flanked barbet
nodes.summary: The spot-flanked barbet (Tricholaema lacrymosa) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae. It is found in Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Kenya, Rwanda, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, and Zambia. References
